key: Tavily API credits pricing tiers free plan pay as you go|5

value.title: Cost-Optimizing Search and Extraction APIs for AI Agents
value.content: Tavily Alternatives Compared — Cost-Optimizing Search and Extraction APIs for AI Agents. Tavily ships as the official LangChain integration `langchain-tavily` (maintained by Tavily) for LangChain, and has effectively become a reference implementation for AI agent development. It rolls search, extraction, and citation formatting into a single interface, which makes it the shortest path to spinning up a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipeline. Once you push that workload into production, Tavily’s credit-based pricing easily produces monthly bills in the thousands of dollars. This post takes Tavily’s pricing model as the baseline, then compares Firecrawl, Brave Search, Exa, Serper, Jina Reader, and SearXNG on price, features, migration effort, and recent industry shifts, before mapping each candidate to a workload. The Pay-As-You-Go rate is $0.008 per credit; monthly plans land between $0.005 and $0.0075, with the entry-level Bootstrap plan at $100/month for 15,000 credits (an effective $0.0067 per credit). Credits cost roughly $1.66 per 1K searches and $0.83 per 1K page extractions on the Standard plan ($99/month, or $83/month with annual billing, 100,000 credits).

value.title: Pricing - Tavily Help Center
value.content: At Tavily, we offer flexible pricing plans to suit different users, from individual researchers to growing teams and enterprises. Whether you need a free plan to get started or a scalable solution to support your business, we have the right plan for you. * **Who is it for?** New creators and individuals exploring Tavily. * **Who is it for?** Enthusiasts who require more API usage. * **Who is it for?** Small teams that need a scalable search solution. ## **Pay-As-You-Go Plan**. * **Who is it for?** Users who prefer a flexible, usage-based model. If you're just getting started, the **Researcher (Free) plan** is perfect for exploring Tavily’s capabilities. If you require more frequent API usage, the **Project, Bootstrap, Startup, or Growth plans** offer increasing levels of resources. Businesses and teams needing flexibility may prefer the **Pay-As-You-Go** model, while enterprises can work with us to build a **custom solution** that fits their needs. How to Set a Limit for Pay as You Go Option?
